$comment: Set true/false to enable/disable features. Rebuild after changes.

$descriptions.header: Top header bar with app title + sidebar toggle buttons. When off, floating toggle buttons appear instead.
$descriptions.footer: Bottom footer with copyright and links.
$descriptions.breadcrumbs: Folder path shown above each note (e.g. Bestiary > Dragons).
$descriptions.disclosure_chevrons: Small ▶ on folders that rotates ▼ when expanded. Helps distinguish folders from notes.
$descriptions.folder_count_badges: Small pill like (5) on folders showing how many notes are inside (recursive).
$descriptions.right_sidebar: The entire right-side panel with page links, backlinks, and coming-soon sections.
$descriptions.sidebar_link_previews: Hover preview popups for links in the right sidebar (referenced pages, backlinks, coming soon).
$descriptions.referenced_pages: Referenced Pages section in the right sidebar — pages the current note links to.
$descriptions.referencing_pages: Referencing Pages section — pages that link to the current note.
$descriptions.coming_soon: Coming Soon section — wiki-links to pages that don't exist yet.
$descriptions.search_bar: Search input field in the sidebar.
$descriptions.search_full_content: When true, searches note titles + body text. When false, matches titles and aliases only.
$descriptions.search_highlight: Yellow highlight on search terms within note content.
$descriptions.theme_toggle: Light/dark mode toggle buttons in the header and sidebar.
$descriptions.wiki_links: Clickable [[link]] cross-references in note content. When off, renders as plain text.
$descriptions.tree_colors: Color inheritance on folder and note labels in the sidebar tree.
$descriptions.tree_icons: Emoji/SVG icons on folders and notes. When off, no icons show (not even default folder open/close).
$descriptions.collapse_all: Collapse all folders button in the sidebar header.
